login.title: Benvenuto
login.invitationDescription: Log in to accept ${inviterName}'s invitation to join ${companyName} on ${clientName}.

login-id.title: Benvenuto
login-id.phoneOrEmailPlaceholder: Indirizzo e-mail o numero di telefono
login-id.invitationDescription: Log in to accept ${inviterName}'s invitation to join ${companyName} on ${clientName}.
login-id.termsAndConditionsTemplate: Continuando, accetti i nostri Termini e condizioni.
login-id.selectCountryCode: Select country code, currently set to ${countryName}, ${countryCode}, +${countryPrefix}
login-id.wrong-email-username-credentials: Incorrect email address, username, or password
login-id.wrong-email-phone-username-credentials: Incorrect email address, phone number, username, or password. Phone numbers must include the country code.
login-id.wrong-email-phone-credentials: Incorrect email address, phone number, or password. Phone numbers must include the country code.
login-id.wrong-phone-username-credentials: Incorrect phone number, username or password. Phone numbers must include the country code.
login-id.custom-script-error-code: Something went wrong, please try again later.
login-id.auth0-users-validation: Something went wrong, please try again later
login-id.authentication-failure: We are sorry, something went wrong when attempting to log in
login-id.ip-blocked: We have detected suspicious login behavior and further attempts will be blocked. Please contact the administrator.
login-id.password-breached: We have detected a potential security issue with this account. To protect your account, we have prevented this login. Please reset your password to proceed.
login-id.user-blocked: Your account has been blocked after multiple consecutive login attempts.
login-id.same-user-login: Too many login attempts for this user. Please wait, and try again later.
login-id.invalid-username: Username can only contain alphanumeric characters or: '${characters}'. Username should have between ${min} and ${max} characters.
login-id.invalid-email-phone: Enter a valid email address or phone number. Phone numbers must include the country code.
login-id.invalid-email-username: Enter a valid email address or username
login-id.invalid-phone-username: Enter a valid phone number or username. Phone numbers must include the country code.
login-id.invalid-email-phone-username: Enter a valid email address, phone number or username. Phone numbers must include the country code.
login-id.no-email-username: Email address or username is required
login-id.no-email-phone: Email address or phone number is required
login-id.no-phone-username: Phone number or username is required
login-id.no-email-phone-username: Phone number, username, or email address is required
login-id.captcha-validation-failure: We are sorry, something went wrong while validating the captcha response. Please try again.
login-id.invalid-recaptcha: Select the checkbox to verify you are not a robot.
login-id.invalid-captcha: Solve the challenge question to verify you are not a robot.
login-id.captcha-client-failure: We couldn't load the security challenge. Please try again. (Error code: #{errorCode})

login-password.title: Inserire la password
login-password.description: Inserire l'indirizzo e-mail e la password per accedere.
login-password.user-blocked: Your account has been blocked after multiple consecutive login attempts.
login-password.password-breached: We have detected a potential security issue with this account. To protect your account, we have prevented this login. Please reset your password to proceed.

signup.title: Scegliere la password
signup.description: Scegliete una password con un mix di lettere maiuscole e minuscole, numeri e simboli.
signup.termsText: By signing up, you agree to our

signup-id.title: Scegliere la password
signup-id.description: Scegliete una password con un mix di lettere maiuscole e minuscole, numeri e simboli.

signup-password.title: Scegliere la password
signup-password.description: Scegliete una password con un mix di lettere maiuscole e minuscole, numeri e simboli.
signup-password.password-policy-not-met: Password does not meet the requirements

reset-password.title: Hai dimenticato la password?
reset-password.description: Fare clic sul pulsante sottostante per ricevere le istruzioni su come reimpostare la password.
reset-password.buttonText: Inviare l'e-mail di reimpostazione della password
reset-password.successTitle: Email di reimpostazione della password inviata
reset-password.successDescription: We have sent a password reset link to your email address.

consent.title: Authorize ${clientName}
consent.description: ${clientName} is requesting access to your account

mfa-otp.title: Enter your code
mfa-otp.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
mfa-otp.invalid-code: The code you entered is invalid

mfa-sms.title: Check your phone
mfa-sms.invalid-code: The code you entered is invalid

mfa-email.title: Check your email
mfa-email.invalid-code: The code you entered is invalid

mfa-push.title: Approve the request
mfa-push.description: We sent a notification to your device

mfa-webauthn.title: Use your security key
mfa-webauthn.description: Insert your security key and follow the instructions

mfa-voice.title: Receive a phone call
mfa-voice.description: We will call ${phoneNumber} with your code
mfa-voice.invalid-code: The code you entered is invalid

mfa-phone.title: Verify your phone
mfa-phone.description: Enter your phone number to receive a verification code

mfa-recovery-code.title: Enter recovery code
mfa-recovery-code.description: Enter one of your recovery codes
mfa-recovery-code.invalid-code: The recovery code you entered is invalid

device-flow.title: Activate your device
device-flow.description: Enter the code shown on your device
device-flow.invalid-code: The code you entered is invalid

email-verification.title: Verificare l'e-mail
email-verification.successDescription: Your email has been verified successfully.
